prompt: Add proper empty states to agent_card.html and tool_card.html partials. Empty state should explain what the page is for and hint at next step — but without adding a button inside the partial. Use only the existing stack.

assertions.text: agent-card-has-empty-state: agent_card.html has an else block or empty-check with descriptive text
tool-card-has-empty-state: tool_card.html has an else block or empty-check with descriptive text
empty-state-uses-muted-styling: Empty state uses .muted class or var(--muted-color), not hardcoded gray hex
no-button-in-agent-partial: The empty state in agent_card.html does not add a <button> element
descriptive-empty-text: Empty state text is specific and contextual (not just 'No items')
